article_title: Trump retreat over Hormuz tolls suggests struggle to end Iran war

tasks.prompt: Which proposal did President Trump retreat from?
options: A 20% toll on cargo passing through the Strait of Hormuz
A ban on all investment from Gulf states
A plan to close every American port
A tax on domestic airline tickets
tasks.correct_answer: A 20% toll on cargo passing through the Strait of Hormuz
tasks.explanation_hebrew: טראמפ נסוג מהצעה לגבות היטל של 20% על מטענים העוברים במצר הורמוז.

tasks.prompt: What reason did Trump give for changing course?
options: A court had already removed him from office
Productive conversations with Middle Eastern leaders
The Strait had permanently dried up
Congress had unanimously ended the war
tasks.correct_answer: Productive conversations with Middle Eastern leaders
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הוא קשר את השינוי לשיחות שתיאר כפוריות עם מנהיגים במזרח התיכון.

tasks.prompt: Why could the original toll proposal have weakened the US diplomatic position?
options: It reduced the physical width of the strait
It guaranteed immediate support from every Gulf ally
It resembled the kind of toll demand the US opposed when associated with Iran
It removed all costs from international shipping
tasks.correct_answer: It resembled the kind of toll demand the US opposed when associated with Iran
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הדרישה האמריקאית יצרה סתירה מול ההתנגדות לגביית תשלום דומה מצד איראן.

tasks.prompt: What does the surprise reportedly expressed by Gulf officials suggest?
options: The proposal had been fully coordinated for months
The Gulf states had already left the region
The toll was a routine technical change with no political effect
Important allies may not have been consulted before the announcement
tasks.correct_answer: Important allies may not have been consulted before the announcement
tasks.explanation_hebrew: ההפתעה מצביעה על תיאום מוגבל עם שותפות אזוריות לפני ההכרזה.

tasks.prompt: Why might a rapid policy reversal be interpreted as evidence that ending the war is difficult? Answer in 3–6 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: The administration must balance military aims, shipping security, international law, and allied interests
A proposal can create new diplomatic or economic costs
Reversal shows that a simple public demand may not survive regional consultation or practical scrutiny

tasks.prompt: In this context, what does “retreat” mean, and why is the word politically significant? Answer in 3–5 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: It means backing away from or abandoning a previously announced position
The term implies pressure, miscalculation, or reduced confidence
It frames the change as more than a neutral technical adjustment

tasks.prompt: Which alternative approach was emphasised after the toll proposal was dropped?
options: A complete end to all regional diplomacy
The closure of the Strait to every commercial vessel
Trade and investment arrangements with Gulf partners
Replacing maritime transport with rail across the ocean
tasks.correct_answer: Trade and investment arrangements with Gulf partners
tasks.explanation_hebrew: לאחר הנסיגה הודגשו שיחות על מסחר והשקעות עם מדינות המפרץ.

tasks.prompt: Write a 120–170 word summary of the article without copying sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Trump backed away from a proposed 20% Hormuz cargo toll
The reversal followed talks with Middle Eastern leaders and a shift toward trade or investment arrangements
The original idea raised legal, diplomatic, and alliance concerns
The episode illustrates the difficulty of combining military pressure with a credible path to ending the Iran war

tasks.prompt: Write 3–6 sentences evaluating whether the reversal should be viewed mainly as pragmatic diplomacy or as policy inconsistency.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: State a clear position or balanced judgement
Use evidence such as allied surprise, legal concerns, regional talks, or the change toward investment agreements
Acknowledge at least one reasonable counterargument

tasks.prompt: Write a three-sentence analytical conclusion explaining what the episode reveals about coalition management during war.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Military and economic proposals affect allies as well as adversaries
Lack of consultation can weaken credibility or unity
Successful war termination requires coordination, legal legitimacy, and an acceptable political settlement
